nutrition.description: Nutritional values for the planned quantity. All values are for the total household batch.

per100g.description: AI-derived baseline nutrition per 100g of the cooked dish. Used for local recalculation when quantity changes — no AI call needed.

servingGrams.description: Estimated total weight in grams for the specified quantity. AI-derived at write-time.

servings.description: Number of persons this quantity is intended for. AI-inferred from context (e.g. 'for 2 people'). Used for per-person nutrition display.

MealPlan.title: MealPlan
MealPlan.description: A meal plan for a specific date.

RecipeDictionaryItem.title: RecipeDictionaryItem
RecipeDictionaryItem.description: A cached dictionary item for recipes.

CommunityRecipeItem.title: CommunityRecipeItem
CommunityRecipeItem.description: Shared nutrition intelligence cache. Populated automatically when owners save dishes with AI-enriched nutrition. Used to skip AI calls for subsequent households adding the same dish.

nutrition_per100g.description: Per-100g nutrition baseline. Shared across all households.

typicalServingGrams.description: Running average of grams per serving across contributing households. Gets more accurate over time.

contributorCount.description: Number of households that have contributed to this entry. Used for running average calculation.

householdSize.description: Number of people in the household. Default: 2. Used as fallback for per-person nutrition when servings data is unavailable, and as the baseline for anomaly detection.

/mealPlans/{date}.description: Collection of meal plans, indexed by date string (YYYY-MM-DD).

/recipeDictionary/{id}.description: Collection of cached recipe translations and video URLs.

/communityRecipes/{id}.description: Shared nutrition intelligence cache. Write-time populated from any household, read by all. Reduces AI calls for common dishes.

/owners/{uid}.description: Household owner profiles including householdSize for per-person nutrition context.
